rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SUK CHEE LEUNG LEW
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. As petitioner has not provided either a fax number or email address, and she lives in Oceanside, CA, no hearing notes will be sent. Note-->hearing notes can only be sent directly to the petitioner, as she is acting in pro per. Issues are waiver of accounting when beneficiaries are minors, real property being vacant for more than a year, and request to distribute all of the personal property to petitioner when that request was not in the original petition.
